_comment: Transitional config for the Vercel-hosted frontend. After Phase E (Cloudflare cut-over) and Phase F (Vercel retirement), this file and the whole Vercel frontend project go away. Until then: /api/* is proxied through to the backend via the existing api.lqcouncil.com → Tailscale Funnel → EVO chain, and all other paths fall through to the SPA shell.
